member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService
member.summary: Additional interface for Prime internal usage. Need to cast the main ITesterService to Internal.ITesterService to access these methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService.UpdateTiuCountersForEndLot(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Updates TIU counters with unit tested information found at end of lot. Behavior differs if chassis type is HBI or HDMT. This is only intended to be called at end of Lot.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService.GetBaseBoardSerialNumberFromEeprom
member.summary: Gets the base board's serial number EEPROM.
member.returns: String containing the base board EEPROM.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService.GetPersonalityCardSerialNumberFromEeprom
member.summary: Gets the personality card's serial number EEPROM.
member.returns: String containing the personality card EEPROM.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService.AddTierEAlarm(Prime.Base.Exceptions.AlarmException,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Inserts a thrown TierE alarm for the current DUT session into TesterService. Inserted alarms can be later retrieved using All inserted alarms are reset during DeviceStart.
member.param: A TierE alarm thrown during DUT session execution.
Name of the instance that threw the alarm.
Session context used for this DUT session.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService.DeviceStart(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset internal storage for this session context during DeviceStart.
member.param: Session context to perform the reset for.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService
member.summary: Service for executing tester hardware related operations.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.ReadI2cData(System.String,System.Byte,System.Int32)
member.summary: Perform an I2C read from an configured I2C pin.
member.param: Pin name of the I2C configured channel to communicate with.
I2C address (7-bit address and read bit).
Number of bytes to read from the I2C device.
member.returns: Byte data returned from the device.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.WriteI2cData(System.String,System.Byte,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Writes data to an I2C device connected to an I2C.
member.param: Pin name of the I2C configured channel to communicate with.
I2C address (7-bit address and write bit).
Byte data to write to device.
If true send stop bit after I2C transaction, otherwise do not send stop bit and maintain control of I2C bus.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.WriteReadI2cData(System.String,System.Byte,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Byte},System.Int32)
member.summary: Perform an I2C write followed by a read from an configured I2C pin without sending a stop bit between each transaction.
member.param: Pin name of the I2C configured channel to communicate with.
I2C address of the device (7-bit address, and ignored R/W type bit).
Byte data to write to device.
Number of bytes to read from the I2C device.
member.returns: Byte data returned from the device.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.ExecuteTdrCalibration(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Perform a new TDR calibration and save the calibration data to the file.
member.param: The pins to be ignored for calibration.
The file name to save the calibration data.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetTdrCalValues(System.String)
member.summary: Read back the TDR calibration values from the tester.
member.param: The pingroup that we want to read the calibration values of.
member.returns: The calibration values of the pingroup.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.LoadTdrCalFromFile(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Load the TDR calibration values to the tester from calibration file.
member.param: The pingroup to load the calibration.
The pins to be ignored for calibration.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.IsTesterOffline
member.summary: checks if the tester is Offline according to the tester operation mode (OfflineLSM, OnlineEngineering, OnlineProduction) .
member.returns: true if the tester is Offline,else, returns false.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.IsTesterHbi
member.summary: Checks if chassis type is HBI.
member.returns: true if chassis type is hbi, else returns false.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetXiuReplacementCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Replacement counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetXiuCleaningCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Cleaning counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetXiuSocketCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Socket counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetXiuBaseBoardCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Base board counter from Eeprom for the given DUT index. No implemented for HBI tester chassis.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetXiuIdentityCardCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Identity board counter from Eeprom for the given DUT index. No implemented for HBI tester chassis.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.ITesterService.GetTierEAlarms(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets a list of TierE alarm exceptions thrown during the current DUT session.
member.returns: List of TierE alarm exceptions thrown during the current DUT session.
member.param: Session context for this DUT session.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.DutStorage`1
member.summary: Tester service local storage.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.DutStorage`1.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset storage data.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.DutStorage`1.GetObject(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get stored object by session.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.DutStorage`1.InsertObject(`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.DutStorage`1.GetLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.IDutStorage`1
member.summary: Tester service local storage.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.IDutStorage`1.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset storage data.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.IDutStorage`1.GetObject(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get stored object by session.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.IDutStorage`1.InsertObject(`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.IDutStorage`1.GetLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.TesterService
member.summary: Tester service.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.TesterService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu
member.summary: Internal IXiu interface.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.WriteTiuCountersAtEndLot(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Writes new values to TIU counters at end of lot. Implementation will differ depending on chassis type being HBI or HDMT.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetXiuReplacementCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Replacement counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetXiuCleaningCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Cleaning counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetXiuSocketCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Socket counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetXiuBaseBoardCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Base board counter from Eeprom for the given DUT index. No implemented for HBI tester chassis.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetXiuIdentityCardCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Identity board counter from Eeprom for the given DUT index. No implemented for HBI tester chassis.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.IXiu.GetPersonalityCardSerialNumberFromEeprom
member.summary: Gets the personality card's serial number EEPROM if applies, empty if doesn't.
member.returns: String containing the personality card EEPROM.

member.name: T:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase
member.summary: XIU base.

member.name: F:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.DefaultTiuIndex
member.summary: Default TIU index.

member.summary: Gets or sets DutIdToEepromIndex.

member.summary: Gets or sets DutIdToTiuIndex.

member.summary: Gets or sets DutIndexToDutId.

member.summary: Gets or sets SocketCounterRecord.

member.summary: Gets or sets ReplacementCounterRecord.

member.summary: Gets or sets CleaningCounterRecord.

member.name: P:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.EepromStructureInitialized
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Eeprom structure is initialized.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.GetXiuReplacementCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Replacement counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.GetXiuCleaningCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Cleaning counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.GetXiuSocketCounterFromEeprom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the Socket counter from EEPROM for the given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.FindTiuIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds TIU index based on DUT index.
member.returns: TIU index for given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.IncreaseXiuSocketCounterInEeprom(System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases Xiu socket counter in Eeprom.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.IncreaseXiuReplacementCounterInEeprom(System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Increases Xiu replacement counter in Eeprom.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.IncreaseXiuCleaningCounterInEeprom(System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Increase Xiu cleaning counter in Eeprom.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.FindEepromIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds and returns Eeprom index based on given DUT index.
member.returns: Eeprom index for given DUT index.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.PopulateDutIdToDutIndexMap
member.summary: Populates DUT id index map.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.SetXiuCounterInEeprom(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Increase the xiu unit counter by counter value.
member.param: The eeprom index to write to.
The counter index to write to.

member.name: M:Prime.TesterService.Xiu.XiuBase.GetXiuCounterFromEeprom(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the xiu counter from Eeprom.

member.summary: Initializes Eeprom index list and Dut index map.
